infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Dispatch uses your location to detect when you arrive at spots around Copenhagen and log your check-ins.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Dispatch uses your location to show where you are on the map.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Dispatch uses your photo library to let you set a profile picture.
